title: nsukchat
description: This mod is an addon that adds NPC dialogue functionality to the Simukarft mod
body:
The core gameplay of this addon revolves around "dialogue-based relationship building" and "affection progression" with NPCs.
Dialogues in the mod are fully customizable.

Right-click to open the mod's dialogue panel.

You can go to the game settings to set the key for opening the merchant NPC's purchase HUD.

如果希望更简洁一点，也可以这样：

Dialogues are customizable. Right-click to open the dialogue panel. The key for the merchant NPC's purchase HUD can be configured in the game settings.

需要我帮你整理成完整的 mod 功能描述文档吗？



By right-clicking an NPC, the player opens a dedicated interaction interface, where they can view the character and engage in dialogue.

The dialogue system supports two types of content sources:

ML Shorthand Code – Custom dialogue that can be bound to specific NPCs by name, UUID, or profession.

Pool Global Dialogue System – Based on the current affection level, the system randomly selects dialogue options from three pools: pool+1, pool-1, and pool0.

Different player responses directly affect the NPC's affection gain or loss. In turn, the affection level determines:

Which dialogue options appear,

What responses the NPC gives,

Whether the player can access further branching content.

The system also supports continuous replies, command suffixes, variable grouping, and hot-reloadable text. As a result, it can handle everything from casual daily chatter to story-driven quests, romance routes, event triggers, and highly personalized interactions.

Overall, the gameplay is about gradually turning an ordinary NPC into an interactive character with unique reactions and emotional depth through ongoing conversation.
